queue_item.action: Build a connector-facing discovery manifest for additive queue-update records before deterministic inventory and effective-state resolution.

progress.verification: 6 deterministic Node tests passed before commit; source and tests were committed as additive files
progress.privacy_boundary: public repository metadata and abstract operational claims only

queue_item.handoff: M-007 should implement an exhaustive paginated repository adapter that obtains every operations/queue-updates path, fetches exact bytes and blob SHA, verifies the containing commit, and feeds a complete candidate set into M-006 then M-005.

claim_state.observed: Discovery, inventory, and effective-state resolution are now represented as separate continuity stages.
claim_state.inferred: Completeness failures must remain visible rather than being collapsed into record-validation failures.
claim_state.proposed: Only manifests with no missing, rejected, or duplicate candidates should be described as exhaustive.
claim_state.superseded: Connector search success as sufficient proof of repository completeness.
claim_state.unresolved: No connector-native exhaustive directory pagination was available in this run.
